'''Shesharile 6''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]]-wide garbage dump. The entire moon would become almost unbearable due to the smell produced by the first spring heat activating the bacteria in the underground waste-sinks.

[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Callista Ming]], at some point in her travels, stopped at Shesharile 6.

{{Moon-stub}}
